defects.description: The phone's back panel and camera bump are facing directly towards the viewer.

regenerate_hint: Ensure the character is holding the phone so the screen is visible to them, even if the screen content is not facing the viewer.

guardrail_candidates.rule: Always show the phone screen oriented towards the character's face. The phone's back should not directly face the viewer.
